nodes.label: @understand-quickly/registry
nodes.summary: Root module of the understand-quickly registry: a static catalog that points at code-graph exports across formats and validates them in CI.

nodes.label: registry.json
nodes.summary: Source-of-truth catalog of registered graphs. Each entry declares id/owner/repo/format/graph_url/description/tags; sync.mjs fetches graph_url and validates it against the declared format's schema.

nodes.label: scripts/validate.mjs
nodes.summary: Static validator: walks registry.json, fetches each entry's graph_url, and runs Ajv against the matching schema in schemas/<format>.json. Exits non-zero on any failure.

nodes.label: scripts/sync.mjs
nodes.summary: Sync runner used by the GitHub Actions workflow. Fetches every entry, schema-validates it, captures status (ok/pending/failed), and writes a status snapshot consumed by the README renderer.

nodes.label: scripts/render-readme.mjs
nodes.summary: Regenerates the entry table in README.md between the AUTO-RENDERED markers, using the latest status snapshot from sync.

nodes.label: loadRegistry
nodes.summary: Reads registry.json from disk, asserts schema_version === 1, returns the entries array.

nodes.label: validateEntry
nodes.summary: Validates a single entry: HEADs graph_url, fetches body, parses JSON, looks up Ajv compiled schema for entry.format, returns {status, errors}.

nodes.label: renderTable
nodes.summary: Builds the markdown rows for the README. Each row shows id, format, status badge (ok/pending/failed), and last-checked timestamp.

nodes.label: Graph Format
nodes.summary: An entry's `format` is a versioned identifier like 'understand-anything@1' or 'gitnexus@1'. A matching schema must live at schemas/<format>.json and a fixture pair (ok.json + bad.json) under schemas/__fixtures__/<format>/.

nodes.label: Ingest Pipeline
nodes.summary: fetch graph_url -> schema-validate against declared format -> snapshot status -> render README. Demo entries point at fixtures hosted on this repo's own Pages site to exercise every stage end-to-end.
